shortDescription.default: IT Equipment asset dashboard built from allocation forms in a SharePoint folder.

longDescription.default: Reads every Equipment Asset Allocation form (.xlsx) from a SharePoint folder, parses employees, items, prices and classes, and renders a filterable equipment dashboard with a styled Excel asset-log export.

features.title: spfx-asset-dashboard Feature
features.description: The feature that activates elements of the spfx-asset-dashboard solution.
